problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: If Federated learning without data centralization is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
